name: Extract complete pen source from CodePen #init-data
description: Extracts COMPLETE HTML, CSS, JS from any CodePen pen. Use js_extract_save (NOT evaluate_js) because the JS field can be hundreds of KB — putting it in context triggers content filters. The #init-data textarea contains the full server-injected pen source. After navigating to a pen page (wait_until='networkidle'), call js_extract_save with the script below.
code: () => { try { const raw = document.getElementById('init-data')?.value; if (!raw) return {error: 'no init-data element'}; const data = JSON.parse(raw); const item = JSON.parse(data.__item || '{}'); return { url: window.location.href, title: item.title || '', html: item.html || '', css: item.css || '', js: item.js || '', html_pre: item.html_pre_processor || 'none', css_pre: item.css_pre_processor || 'none', js_pre: item.js_pre_processor || 'none', tags: (item.tags || []).join(',') }; } catch(e) { return {error: e.message}; } }

name: Navigate CodePen search results (React SPA)
description: CodePen search is a React SPA — pen links are dynamically rendered. After navigate, ALWAYS call analyze_links() to read the live DOM (NOT get_html which only returns the static shell with no pen links). Pen URL pattern: codepen.io/{username}/pen/{slug}. Paginate via ?page=2, ?page=3 (12 results/page). Report pen URLs with report_urls().

name: Download CodePen pen as ZIP (complete source with formatting)
description: Downloads a pen's full source as a ZIP using the authenticated export endpoint. Requires auth cookies loaded. Preferred over #init-data when you want properly formatted/indented code. Use download_url with the constructed export URL — no need to click any buttons.
steps: Call evaluate_js with: () => window.location.pathname.split('/pen/')[1] || '' to get the slug
Call download_url with url: 'https://codepen.io/cpe/pen/export/{slug}' (replace {slug} with the actual slug)
On success: {path, filename, size_bytes} is returned — the ZIP is in artifacts/
If download_url returns an error, fall back to the codepen-init-data skill
note: download_url copies CF clearance + auth cookies into a new context automatically. No selector clicking needed.
